title: NSDAP Leadership
description: The principal leaders of the National Socialist regime, their roles, and their fates.

leaders.name: Hermann Göring
leaders.role: Reichsmarschall; Head of Luftwaffe; designated successor until 1945
leaders.fate: Sentenced to death at Nuremberg; suicide by cyanide, 15 October 1946

leaders.name: Heinrich Himmler
leaders.role: Reichsführer-SS; Head of Gestapo and SS; Interior Minister
leaders.fate: Suicide by cyanide after capture, 23 May 1945

leaders.name: Joseph Goebbels
leaders.role: Reich Minister of Propaganda; Reich Chancellor (1 day)
leaders.fate: Suicide with wife Magda (who killed their 6 children), 1 May 1945, Berlin

leaders.name: Martin Bormann
leaders.role: Head of the Party Chancellery; Hitler's personal secretary
leaders.fate: Died attempting to escape Berlin, 1–2 May 1945 (confirmed 1998 by DNA)

leaders.name: Rudolf Hess
leaders.role: Deputy Führer until 1941; flew solo to Scotland
leaders.fate: Life sentence at Nuremberg; suicide in Spandau Prison, 17 August 1987, age 93

leaders.name: Albert Speer
leaders.role: Reich Minister for Armaments; Hitler's architect

leaders.name: Karl Dönitz
leaders.role: Commander U-boats; then Commander Kriegsmarine; Hitler's successor as Reich President
leaders.fate: 10 years imprisonment at Nuremberg; released 1956; died 1980
